data.title: Almadex Minerals announces Almaden's completion of gold loan repayment, as per secured agreement.
data.description: VANCOUVER, BC, 18th July 2025 - Almadex Minerals Ltd. has disclosed the completion of the repayment by Almaden Minerals Ltd. of the gold loan, as per the secured gold loan agreement, between the two companies. The repayment marks the conclusion of the Gold Loan and is in accordance with the press releases issued on June 27, 2024 and May 14, 2019. Almadex Minerals Ltd. operates under the ticker symbol "DEX" on the TSX-V exchange.

data.title: Workato announces speaker lineup for WOW 2025 conference happening on August 18-20 in Vegas with focus on enterprise AI.
data.description: In Palo Alto, California, Workato revealed the lineup for its flagship customer and partner conference, World of Workato (WOW) 2025. Scheduled for August 18-20 at The Cosmopolitan in Las Vegas, the conference will focus on the theme "Re(AI)lize Tomorrow" and showcase the evolving landscape of enterprise AI. The event aims to highlight the shift in AI agents.

data.title: Aurora supercomputer in Illinois is transforming scientific research with AI & simulation, enabling breakthroughs in complex challenges.
data.description: In Lemont, Illinois, Aurora is leading a transformative effort in the scientific community by utilizing artificial intelligence (AI) and simulation to address highly intricate issues in science and engineering fields. This innovative approach is set to make significant strides in advancing research and problem-solving processes.

data.title: President Trump signs GENIUS Act integrating crypto into US economy. Stablecoin bill signed after Congress passed it.
data.description: The stablecoin bill was signed by President Trump at a high-profile event, with key industry figures in attendance. This action came swiftly after the bill was approved by Congress, within a span of just one day.

data.title: Duke Energy in Indiana prepares for severe storms, possible outages this weekend due to strong thunderstorms and damaging winds.
data.description: In Plainfield, Indiana, Duke Energy is closely monitoring upcoming weather forecasts predicting severe conditions such as strong thunderstorms and damaging winds. The company is gearing up for possible widespread power outages in its service territory this weekend. Being proactive in their approach, Duke Energy is preparing to address the challenges posed by the anticipated weather conditions to ensure minimal disruption for its customers.
